'''''Enin'sd''''' was an [[XQ4 Platform]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==History==
The platform received the ''[[Sealion]]'', a prototype of the [[Missile Boat]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]], from the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] ''[[Link]]'' before its capture.

The [[Garrett (Star Destroyer)|''Garrett'']] managed to track the location of the station then [[Recovery of the Sealion|launched an attack]] with [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] in one of the missile boats. Despite numerous fighters, ranging from [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] and [[R-41 Starchaser]]s to attacking the ''Garrett'' with [[A-wing]]s, [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]], [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] and help of the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] ''[[Piimi]]'' and the late arrival of the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Equator]]'', the platform was destroyed, and its cargo was largely destroyed (save for the ''Sealion'' itself, which had been illicitly recovered by Stele under orders from the [[Prophets of the Dark Side]]).

==Behind the scenes==
''Enin'sd'' is [[MemoryAlpha:Deep Space 9|DS Nine]] spelled backwards, a [[Memoryalpha:Star Trek|Star Trek]] reference.

*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'' Collector's CD-ROM]] {{1st}}
